allow: PowerShell($conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; foreach \($c in $conns\) { Stop-Process -Id $c.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue })
PowerShell(Get-Process -Name "node" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, @{N="CommandLine";E={$_.CommandLine}} | Format-Table -AutoSize)
PowerShell(Get-Process -Id 55988)
PowerShell(Stop-Process -Id 55988 -Force)
PowerShell(Stop-Process -Id 55680 -Force)

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force }; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5173 -State Listen | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force }; Write-Output "Services stopped")

PowerShell($env:RAGV_LOG_LEVEL = "DEBUG"; Start-Process -WindowStyle Hidden -WorkingDirectory \(Get-Location\) -FilePath "python" -ArgumentList @\('-m','uvicorn','app.api.server:app','--host','0.0.0.0','--port','8000','--log-level','warning'\) -RedirectStandardOutput logs\\dev-backend.out.log -RedirectStandardError logs\\dev-backend.err.log; Write-Output "backend PID: $\(\(Get-Process -Id $!\).Id\)")

PowerShell($env:VITE_API_DEBUG = "true"; Start-Process -WindowStyle Hidden -WorkingDirectory \(Join-Path \(Get-Location\) 'ui'\) -FilePath "npm" -ArgumentList @\('run','dev','--','--host','127.0.0.1'\) -RedirectStandardOutput logs\\dev-frontend.out.log -RedirectStandardError logs\\dev-frontend.err.log; Write-Output "frontend started")

PowerShell($env:RAGV_LOG_LEVEL = "DEBUG"; $p = Start-Process -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden -WorkingDirectory \(Get-Location\) -FilePath "python" -ArgumentList @\('-m','uvicorn','app.api.server:app','--host','0.0.0.0','--port','8000','--log-level','warning'\) -RedirectStandardOutput \(Join-Path \(Get-Location\) "logs\\dev-backend.out.log"\) -RedirectStandardError \(Join-Path \(Get-Location\) "logs\\dev-backend.err.log"\); Write-Output "PID=$\($p.Id\)")
PowerShell(Get-Process -Id 32792 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)
PowerShell(Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)

PowerShell(Get-Process -Id \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; netstat -ano | Select-String ":8000 " | Select-String "LISTEN"; Write-Output "backend stopped")

PowerShell(Get-Process -Id 3328 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2)

PowerShell(Get-Process -Id 34304 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "running: $\($_.Id\)" }; if \(-not \(Get-Process -Id 34304 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\)\) { Write-Output "process not found" })

PowerShell($env:RAGV_LOG_LEVEL = "DEBUG"; $p = Start-Process -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden -WorkingDirectory \(Get-Location\) -FilePath "python" -ArgumentList @\('-m','uvicorn','app.api.server:app','--host','0.0.0.0','--port','8000','--log-level','warning'\) -RedirectStandardOutput \(Join-Path \(Get-Location\) "logs\\dev-backend.out.log"\) -RedirectStandardError \(Join-Path \(Get-Location\) "logs\\dev-backend.err.log"\); Write-Output "PID=$\($p.Id\)"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 8; Write-Output "alive=$\($p.HasExited\)")
PowerShell(Get-Content \(Join-Path \(Get-Location\) "logs\\dev-backend.err.log"\) -Tail 20)

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; Write-Output "killed")

PowerShell($env:RAGV_LOG_LEVEL = "DEBUG"; $p = Start-Process -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden -WorkingDirectory \(Get-Location\) -FilePath "python" -ArgumentList @\('-m','uvicorn','app.api.server:app','--host','0.0.0.0','--port','8000','--log-level','warning'\) -RedirectStandardOutput \(Join-Path \(Get-Location\) "logs\\dev-backend.out.log"\) -RedirectStandardError \(Join-Path \(Get-Location\) "logs\\dev-backend.err.log"\); Write-Output "backend PID=$\($p.Id\)")

PowerShell($env:VITE_API_DEBUG = "true"; $p = Start-Process -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden -WorkingDirectory \(Join-Path \(Get-Location\) "ui"\) -FilePath "npx" -ArgumentList @\('vite','--host','127.0.0.1'\) -RedirectStandardOutput \(Join-Path \(Get-Location\) "logs\\dev-frontend.out.log"\) -RedirectStandardError \(Join-Path \(Get-Location\) "logs\\dev-frontend.err.log"\); Write-Output "frontend PID=$\($p.Id\)")

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5173 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; Write-Output "services stopped")
